column1: # SOURCE: Synthetic summary of Egypt FIT rates from EgyptERA decrees
# DESCRIPTION: Egypt feed-in tariff rates for solar PV by project size category
# NOTES: Round 1 (2014) and Round 2 (2016). EGP rates for small-scale have not been adjusted for devaluation.
# NOTES: Program effectively closed to new large-scale applications as of 2020.
# LOGIC: Rates from EgyptERA FIT program decrees; small-scale EGP rates set in 2014 piasters converted to EGP
# ASSUMPTIONS: USD rates at time of contract signing; EGP small-scale rates frozen at 2014 levels

column2: EGP for small-scale (as denominated in original decrees)
